name: Wiz
description: Monitor Wiz cloud security posture management for vulnerability findings and compliance controls

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Wiz at https://app.wiz.io
2. Go to Settings → Service Accounts
3. Click Create Service Account with read permissions
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Wiz Settings → Service Accounts → Create Service Account

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Generated when creating a Service Account in Wiz Settings

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Wiz is scanning cloud environments and detecting security issues

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Wiz users with access to cloud security findings
